name: reachable-npm-callgraph-test
description: npm call graph validation: REACHABLE vs NOT_REACHABLE npm CVEs

_comments.PURPOSE: JS call graph canary. If call graph does NOT run, node-serialize and semver show UNKNOWN. If call graph runs correctly, they show NOT_REACHABLE.
_comments.lodash-4.17.20: CVE-2021-23337 - prototype pollution - REACHABLE: called from src/routes/merge.js which is required by server.js
_comments.minimist-1.2.5: CVE-2021-44906 - prototype pollution - REACHABLE: called from src/routes/args.js entrypoint
_comments.node-serialize-0.0.4: CVE-2017-5941 - RCE via unserialize() - NOT_REACHABLE: imported in src/utils/serializer.js but that file is never required
_comments.semver-5.7.1: CVE-2022-25883 - ReDoS - NOT_REACHABLE: imported in src/utils/version_check.js which is never required from any entrypoint
